name: first-load critical path (JS, gzipped) - 280 kB: #856 splits MUI/emotion + React-runtime vendor code out of the entry into long-cached chunks. The entry HTML modulepreloads all three (index + mui + react-vendor), so the budget measures their combined gzip. ~263 kB today; 280 kB gives headroom for the chunk-boundary overhead the split adds while staying close to the original <=260 kB single-chunk intent (UI-NFR-01). Acceptable for a LAN app.
